Ryanair Soars Past 200 Million Passengers In One Year, Sets New European Record In Air Travel
data.description: Ryanair flew 200.2 million passengers in one year, a 9% increase and a record for a European airline. CEO welcomes 200 millionth passenger.

data.title: First-Ever Catastrophe Bond ETF Hits The Market But Without A Safety Net
data.description: US ETF with first cat bond fund, Brookmont Catastrophic Bond ETF (ARCA: ILS), provides exposure to $50B cat bond sector. Debuting without lead market maker, may impact trading. ILS offers low-correlation, high-yield alternative for investors seeking diversification & income.

data.title: Xiaomi Stock: Will Investor Confidence Hold Up?
data.description: Xiaomi's EV crash raises two key questions: Will it lose investor confidence, and how safe are vehicles with driver-assistance systems?
